content.en:
In the small realm of the Wind King, there is a trading city.

At this time, there were no people in this trading city, but before the domain boundary was broken, it was very lively.

Ye Tian and the Dragon Power Peak Lord came here, sat down in an uninhabited attic, and chatted about Black Wind Mountain while drinking.

"Ye Tianfeng Lord, have you thought of the name of the Peak Lord?"

Lord Long Li Feng asked.

"If you think about it, let's call it the Lord of the Nine Poles Peak!"

Ye Tian said.

The Nine Poles originated from the Nine Extremes True Body Technique, which was Ye Tian's own Chaos Alchemy Technique, so it was also appropriate to use the name of the Nine Extremes Peak Master.

"Okay, in the future in Black Wind Mountain, I will call you the Lord of the Nine Poles Peak!" said the Lord of Longli Peak with a smile.

The two chatted for a while and began to get to the point.

"Nine Pole Peak Lord, how much do you know about Black Wind Mountain?"

Lord Long Li Feng asked.

Ye Tian told him what he knew, and what he knew was nothing more than some general information about Black Wind Mountain, such as the strength of Black Wind Mountain surpassed that of the Middle Triple Heaven Force, and it was very likely to be comparable to the Upper Triple Heaven Force.

Black Wind Mountain has ten kings, hundreds of generals, many peak masters, and countless legions, and it is a force in a bandit situation.

When Ye Tian finished speaking, the Dragon Power Peak Lord smiled and said, "Nine Pole Peak Lord, what you said is not bad, but it is relatively one-sided, in fact, even I don't know the true essence of Black Wind Mountain." But I definitely know more than the outside world, a lot more than you. "

Ye Tian listened with a serious face.

I saw the Lord of Long Li Peak narrate: "We have ten kings in Black Wind Mountain, but many people in the outside world don't know the strength of the ten kings, because the ten kings rarely make moves, and even rarely show up, and almost no one knows what the ten kings look like, for example, I don't know what the ten kings look like, and every time the ten kings come forward, they wear masks." But the strength of the Ten Kings is very strong, unbelievably powerful, as far as I know, any of the Ten Kings has the combat power of the strongest Dao Ancestor! As for whether we have an invincible Dao Ancestor in Black Wind Mountain, then I don't know. "

"Ten Kings, Supreme Dao Ancestor !!!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

The Supreme Dao Ancestor is the Eightfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and the Fivefold Heavenly Dao Ancestor is like an ant in front of the Supreme Dao Ancestor!

He never expected that the Ten Kings of Black Wind Mountain would be so powerful, so wouldn't Black Wind Mountain be the Eighth Heaven Force?

The Lord of Longli Peak said: "The Ten Kings have established ten small realms, and these ten small realms are the foundation of our Black Wind Mountain. It's a pity that in the first battle of the Domain Realm, four of the Ten Kings were killed, and only six are left, and all of them have been severely damaged. In addition to the Ten Kings, we have many Dao Ancestors in Black Wind Mountain, and some of them are also able to reach the level of six or seven heavens, and they are all currently sleeping. For these Dao Ancestors, we call them Heavenly Kings! At our peak, we had tens of thousands of Heavenly King-level powerhouses! At present, there are only a thousand Heavenly Kings left! Nine thousand Heavenly Kings have fallen, and some of them are equivalent to guarding the fall of Black Wind Mountain when they are shuttling through the Dark Forbidden Domain. "

"Under the Heavenly King are the generals, there are a hundred generals in the Black Wind Mountain, but the strict number is 108 generals, and there are only more than forty generals left. As for the peak masters, there were hundreds of thousands of peak masters at the peak, and there are only a few thousand peak masters left! In addition to these, there are also a large number of true ancestors in the Black Wind Mountain, and the specific number is too many, and I don't know very well. I don't know how many people are left. "

With the narration of the Lord of Longli Peak, Ye Tian had a detailed understanding of the strength of Black Wind Mountain.

In short, Black Wind Mountain is very strong and strong, not weaker than the Eight Heavens at all, and even among the Eight Heavens Forces, it can be called the top.

Next, the Dragon Power Peak Lord took Ye Tian to a library pavilion in the Wind King Small Realm.

Originally, the Library Pavilion was not in the small realm of the Wind King, but in a place of inheritance or a stronghold in the Black Wind Mountain.

However, the Domain Realm was shattered, and the Black Wind Mountain suffered heavy losses, and many important places were moved to the small realms, including those library pavilions.

These library cabinets contain many precious classics and some inheritances, which only the peak master is qualified to browse.

The Lord of Longli Peak did not accompany Ye Tian much, and then left.

Ye Tian went to the Library Pavilion and slowly browsed through those cultivation classics, as well as the public inheritances that could be observed.

Originally, Ye Tian had collected countless inheritances and martial arts classics, and now he had such an important channel that he could browse countless precious classics at any time, which gave him full confidence in creating his own True Ancestor Exercises.

The True Ancestor Exercise is to enhance the power of the True Ancestor, if there is no True Ancestor Exercise, the improvement speed of the True Ancestor's power is too slow, and I am afraid that it will be difficult to ascend to the middle realm of the Great Dao for countless billions of years.

But if you have the True Ancestor Technique, it will not be very difficult to improve the power of the True Ancestor.

However, Ye Tian's situation is different.

His True Ancestor power is very strong, with forbidden attributes, even if he cultivates the top True Ancestor Technique, it will halve the effect of the forbidden attribute, and he will not be able to exert the effect of the power of the Forbidden True Ancestor.

Therefore, he wanted to create a set of True Ancestor Exercises that were completely suitable for his own situation.

this day.

Ye Tian actually found a detailed introduction about the power of the dark taboo in the library pavilion, it turned out that in the Shentian realm, there were also many people who had mastered the power of the dark taboo.

What surprised Ye Tian even more was that if he wanted to become a supreme Dao Ancestor and an invincible Dao Ancestor, he had to master the power of the Dark Tabo, but he didn't say exactly how to do it.

But it says about the forbidden body.

Once the power of the dark taboo is completely tempered into a body, it is cultivated into a forbidden body, once it is tempered to forty percent, it is a small body of the forbidden body, which can exert the forbidden realm; if the body is tempered into seventy percent, it is the great completion of the forbidden body, which can incarnate the dark forbidden domain and show the terrifying power; if the forbidden body is tempered to ten percent, it is the perfect forbidden body, which is the real forbidden dao body.

As for what the Forbidden Dao Body has abilities, it was not mentioned above, and it is estimated that the person who wrote this book is not clear.

"It turns out that the forbidden body is Xiaocheng, and it can cast the forbidden realm, I wonder if the forbidden body of the lord of the forbidden hall has reached the realm of Xiaocheng?"

Ye Tian was quite curious about this.

But judging from the situation recorded above, it is very difficult for the forbidden body to become a small one, and countless treasures containing the power of the dark taboo are needed, and many Dao ancestors who have mastered the power of the dark taboo have risked their lives to enter the dark forbidden realm, and until the day of their fall, they have not been able to refine the forbidden body to the realm of Xiaocheng.

Ye Tian stayed in the Library Pavilion for a hundred years before he left the small realm of the Wind King and returned to the territory of the human race.

Next, Ye Tian began to retreat and cultivate again, one was to stabilize the realm and improve his strength, and the other was to try to create the True Ancestor Technique and the True Ancestor level alchemy.

As for other things, he doesn't care at the moment.

Due to the blessing of the records of the three major Xuan Xuan Ancient Realms, Ye Tian's comprehension increased to a terrifying level, and he began to take a Heavenly Soul Pill again, causing Ye Tian to be very relaxed in the process of creating exercises, and there was no difficulty at all.

One Heavenly Soul Pill after another was refined by Ye Tian, until Ye Tian was unable to use the Heavenly Soul Pill to cultivate, because he had refined a full nine Heavenly Soul Pills from the past to now, reaching the limit.

Fortunately, Ye Tian finally succeeded in creating the True Ancestor Technique and the Nine Extremes True Body Technique at the True Ancestor level.

For the True Ancestor Technique and the Nine Extremes True Body Formula, Ye Tian unified them together and directly named the Nine Extremes True Formula!

After the Nine Extremes True Recipe was created, Ye Tian began to cultivate.

With this cultivation, Ye Tian felt that the power of the True Ancestor had increased rapidly, and the strength of his body had also grown rapidly, and his strength was simply increasing all the time.

Ye Tian also knew that the reason why his strength had improved so quickly was related to the Nine Extremes True Technique, and the increase in the records of the Three Ancient Realms, otherwise his cultivation speed would not have been so perverted.

In a flash, 10,000 years have passed!
